title: Polish Morning Glory Noodles
description: A nutty and juicy Polish dish featuring morning-glory-pak-bung and nuka-pickle, perfect for a Jain-friendly meal
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the noodles according to the package instructions
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and saute the onion until translucent
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning
Add the morning glory to the skillet and cook until wilted, stirring occasionally
Stir in the nuka pickle, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper
Combine the cooked noodles and morning glory mixture in a large serving dish
Toss everything together to combine and serve hot
Garnish with additional nuka pickle and sesame oil if desired
